commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: Thousand. This Moses had repeatedly foretold, Leviticus xxvi. 13., and Deuteronomy xxviii. 7.

commentaries.author: Gregory of Nyssa
commentaries.content: For faithful is he who has promised that “a thousand shall be chased by one,” and that “ten thousand shall be put to flight by two,” victory in battle being due not to numbers but to righteousness. - "Answer to Eunomius’s Second Book"

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
